function.name: _company_member_create_new
function.description: Create a new account and add it as a company member. Unlike _company_member_create, this method creates a brand new account.

userName.description: Username for the new account (login name, must be unique).

password.description: Login password for the new account.

leaderIdList.description: Leader account ID list for this member.

roleIdList.description: Role ID list to assign to this member.

departmentIdList.description: Department ID list for this member (optional).

rowNumber.description: Display order number (optional). Smaller number means higher position.
